'''Cassander''' – originally known as '''Cassander's Star''' – was the chief [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Cassandran Worlds/Legends|Cassandran sectors]]. It was the sector capital of [[Cassander sector/Legends|Cassander sector]] under the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], and it was on the [[Braxant Run/Legends|Braxant Run]].

During the expansion to the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the planet was an unsuccessful trading rival to [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]].<ref name="TEA" />

This planet became the central body of the Cassandran Worlds before the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] took it over. It was conquered by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] during the first stages of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].
